title: 7 Herbal Creams for Gouty with Urinary Calculus
description: Juniperus communis creams are used to help with urinary calculus, which is a condition where small, hard stones form in the urinary tract. This cream contains properties and constituents from the juniper tree, including terpenes and flavonoids, that help to reduce inflammation and relax the muscles in the urinary tract. The terpenes, specifically alpha-pinene and beta-pinene, have anti-inflammatory effects, while the flavonoids, such as kaempferol, have antioxidant properties that help...
